mind begins to balance and reach a same order. In such a state
of mind, solutions to the problems can be found easily. That is how
natives can be guided in their times of distress.
That is why the astrologers suggest Homa (offerings to the
sacred fire) and others intonings, so that native can enjoy a sane
and balanced mind., reaching the etherial planes.
WHAT ARE HOMAS (OFFERINGS TO THE SACRED
FIRE)
Let us discuss it in a simple form. When a person enters a
place, where red-chillies is being roasted, there will be smoke and
irritating suffocating atmosphere. The visitor cannot tolerate it, and
suffers choking-up ofthe respiratory system. But when a person
visits a place, where HOMA (Offerings to Sacred Fire) is being
performed, although the smoke may be a bit choking, still the
person does not altogether dissent it, because, in the mind he is
aware of the difference between the smoke of the chilli powder
roasting and the smoke of offering to the Sacred Fire.
